update.releaseNotes:
v5.1.0 - Changelog
New --- - New frontend feature to search for options via their title and/or description with highlighting and navigation built-in. Options that did not have them now do. - Add performance logging to the frontend (viewable to developers only). - Add Discord support to the frontend as a new page. You will need a token generated from your Discord Developer Portal, a bot that shares the same server as you, and your numerical user ID. Once set up and every time the bot starts and stops, it will send a Discord DM to you with timestamps and the reason (if any) of why it stopped. - Home page now has its icon next to the Start/Stop button more fleshed out to perform a device check on your display setup when the app is first launched. If it detects an issue, it will show a tooltip warning of degraded performance and the reason why like mismatched DPI for example.
Adjustments --- - Update `Automation Library` version to `2.4.5` for up-to-date Discord support. - Performance optimizations has led to the frontend feeling more smoother. - Made the frontend autosave whenever a setting is changed and debounced it to prevent excessive writes back to back. - Add fallback handling for stat gains and failure chance if their anchor points were not found to prevent `NullPointerException` from being printed in the logs.
Fixed --- - Fix bug where the first time an aptitude check was performed, it led to stats being shown as -1. - Fix edge case where `!` and `|` were being read as `1` when reading the user in-game race agenda title. - Fix edge case where fan requirement was being hindered by the user disabling fan farming. - Fix edge case where Unity Cup opponent selection could skip over one of the selections.
